title: BRAM generator doesn't make any transp memories
body:
generator.py
```
        if random.randrange(2) or True:
            maxpol = 4
            maxtransp = 1
```
due to `or True` maxtransp is always 1
```
        def generate_transp(i):
            if wrmode[i] == 0:
                return random.randrange(maxtransp)
            return 0
```
and above random.randrange(1) will give always 0
